text: I recently purchased a gadget from your store, and I'm really disappointed. It doesn't function at all as advertised, and I'm feeling misled. I have followed all the instructions correctly, but the device remains unresponsive. It’s frustrating because I was really looking forward to using it during my camping trip next week. Can you please do something about this?

I'm really frustrated because I can't log into my account at all! I reset my password three times already, but it just won't let me in. Can someone help me out here? I feel like I'm missing something.
I thought I could get support 24/7, but your website says otherwise. This is so frustrating!
I am unsure what the exact process is to update my payment information, as I have encountered conflicting instructions on your website. Can you clarify this for me?
My app crashes when I try to log in, but I'm not sure why.
I was told my order would arrive yesterday, but it’s still not here. This is so frustrating since I needed it for an event!
Hey, I ordered a pair of shoes last week and they didn't fit. Can I get my money back? Also, the box was kinda damaged, not sure if that matters.
I can't believe I got a blender that doesn't even blend! My morning smoothies are ruined, and I had to go out and buy one instead. Why is it so hard to get things right?
i tried to use my discount code but it didn’t work, kinda frustrating!
I’m really upset, I bought this product and it didn’t work at all! I need my money back ASAP!
I am having truble accessing my acount, I tried resetting the password but nothing is coming through. Can you assist me?
i got charged for two months but i only wanted one. can u fix this?
My app keeps crashing every time I try to log in. It's so frustrating! I just want to access my account.

I've been trying to upload a video for the past hour, but it just keeps freezing at 75%. I don’t know if it’s my internet or something else, but it’s really frustrating. Sometimes it seems like the upload will start over, but then it just hangs. Can you help me figure this out? I really need to get this video up today!
I ordered a blender last month, and it came with a dent. It’s not what I paid for. Feels unfair. Can't believe this happened.

I must express my dissatisfaction regarding the service I received, especially considering the fact that the item I ordered was, in fact, delivered a week late and I had to miss an important event because of it. Moreover, I had to deal with multiple representatives who each provided conflicting information about the status of my order, which was incredibly frustrating. How can this be acceptable?
